_description: Final 15 pre-match probability estimates submitted to the platform

questions.text: Will Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) score a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.key_data: Jimenez: 1G/2SOT in 2 starts (RSA, KOR). lambda_MEX=1.160, goal_share=33%, lambda_jimenez=0.383

questions.text: Will the second half produce more goals than the first half in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.instrument: Smarkets 'Highest scoring half' 3-way market — Second Half contract

questions.text: Will Mexico have more shots on target than Ecuador in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.key_data: lambda_MEX_SOT=3.870, lambda_ECU_SOT=3.025. Skellam raw=0.550. RULE8 blend: 0.65×0.550+0.35×0.50=0.533

questions.text: Will the match have 2 or fewer total goals in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.key_data: OU2.5 Under = 0.6996. Combined lambda_goals=1.966 consistent with low-scoring expectation.

questions.text: Will Gonzalo Plata (Ecuador) score or assist a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.key_data: Plata: 1G/0A in 3 starts. lambda_ECU=0.806, goal_share=35%, lambda_plata=0.282. P(score)=0.246, P(score OR assist)=0.321

questions.text: Will Mexico have 6 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.instrument: Poisson tail probability from market-fitted lambda
questions.key_data: lambda_MEX_SOT=3.870. P(>=6 SOT) = 1-poisson.cdf(5, 3.870) = 0.195. Mexico never hit 6 SOT in any WC2026 group match.

questions.text: Will a goal be scored from outside the penalty area in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.instrument: Historical WC knockout base rate (no market, no ESPN precedent)
questions.key_data: Base rate ~8-12% of goals are OTB. Expected goals ~2.0. P(>=1 OTB goal) ≈ 0.18

questions.text: Will an own goal be scored in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.key_data: WC2022: 6 OGs in 64 matches = 9.4% match rate. Conservative end given tight match and Mexico's clean defensive profile.

questions.text: Will Mexico win in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will there be 9 or more total corner kicks in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.instrument: Smarkets corners OU8.5 Over contract (market trusted over ESPN model)
questions.key_data: OU8.5 Over = 0.4007. ESPN model predicted ~6.2 corners (MEX avg 1.67 + ECU competitive avg 4.5). Market overruled ESPN-only estimate.

questions.text: Will there be 4 or more total cards shown in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.key_data: OU3.5 Over = 0.5371. ECU group YC: 1, 1, 3 (avg 1.67). MEX group YC: 1, 0, 1 (avg 0.67). Combined 2.33 avg.

questions.text: Will there be 3 or more offside calls in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.instrument: Poisson from ESPN offside averages + RULE8 context shade
questions.key_data: MEX avg 1.33 offsides/game, ECU avg 0.67. Combined lambda=2.0. Raw P(>=3)=0.323. Shaded to 0.28 per RULE8 context and ECU's structural low-offside profile.

questions.text: Will a goal be scored before the first hydration break?
questions.instrument: Time-window Poisson scaling + time bracket market cross-check
questions.key_data: lambda_0_to_25 = 1.966 × (25/90) = 0.546 → P = 0.421. Time bracket: 1-10+11-20+partial21-25 ≈ 0.354. Central estimate: 0.40

questions.text: Will a penalty kick be awarded during regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will there be 20 or more total shots (on and off target) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.instrument: Smarkets shots OU20.5 + OU21.5 markets, lambda-fitted
questions.key_data: OU20.5 Over=0.521 → lambda=20.91; OU21.5 Over=0.465 → lambda=21.26. Avg lambda=21.08. P(>=20)=0.623. Cross-check: MEX avg 11.67 shots + ECU competitive avg 9.5 = ~21.2.
